generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/dtdf#
prefix base: http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#
instance PredictedBehaviorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted system behavior based on simulation models"
]
instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected safety violations in system operation"
]
instance OptimalityStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current system optimality status based on analysis"
]
instance OptimizedParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized parameters for system efficiency"
]
instance ControlCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to adjust Physical Twin based on control service",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Reproduces and predicts Physical Twin's behavior under current conditions",
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictedBehaviorInsight
]
instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Assesses safety and optimal performance via real-time data analysis",
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, OptimalityStatusInsight
]
instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enhances system efficiency using optimization algorithms",
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizedParametersInsight
]
instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides supervisory control through supervisory controllers",
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlCommandAction
]
instance SciPyMinimizeSolver : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python SciPy minimize solver for parameter tuning and control algorithm implementation",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService, ControlService
]
instance RabbitMQMessageBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message broker for real-time data exchange between physical system and digital components",
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, MonitoringService, OptimizationService, ControlService
]
instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD-based geometric model representing structural dimensions",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SciPyMinimizeSolver
]
instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Differential equations model for dynamic system behavior",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SciPyMinimizeSolver
]
instance ThermalSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ThermalSensor
]
instance ThermalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Thermal sensors measuring system temperature for monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:producedData ThermalSensorDataTransmitted
]
instance ThermalSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time thermal sensor data collected over time",
    DTDFVocab:fromData ThermalSensorDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SciPyMinimizeSolver
]
instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Single-board computer managing thermal actuation and sensor data acquisition"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Raspberry Pi controller subscribes to RabbitMQ messages for fan and heatbed control commands, validated by a safe protocol in the low-level driver to prevent unsafe operations. Execution confirmation is sent via RabbitMQ, with conflict resolution managed by the driver's safety mechanisms."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is maintained via calibration algorithms that adjust parameters of the Cyber-Physical System (CPS) and environmental models using sensor data. Validation is performed through monitoring systems assessing safety and operational optimality, with error detection via violation alerts triggering corrective actions by humans or algorithms."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is deployed on-premise using a Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hosting both RabbitMQ communication server and controller components. This embedded system handles real-time processing with local data storage, utilizing RabbitMQ's message durability features for reliability."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "In order keep the device in a safe state, a safe protocol is incorporated into the low-level driver. Monitors check whether the system is performing safely and optimally, and when violations are detected, humans or other algorithms may decide to make changes to the physical twin."
]
